prompts.name: Emerald Eyes
prompts.text: Use vivid emerald green eyes with clear reflections, expressive pupils, and a lively, attractive gaze.

prompts.name: Sapphire Eyes
prompts.text: Use deep sapphire blue eyes with rich color, clean highlights, and a calm, striking appearance.

prompts.name: Amber Eyes
prompts.text: Use warm amber eyes with golden undertones and soft luminous reflections.

prompts.name: Crimson Eyes
prompts.text: Use elegant crimson eyes with a strong, memorable gaze and clean iris detail.

prompts.name: Violet Eyes
prompts.text: Use soft violet eyes with subtle gradients and a dreamy, distinctive look.

prompts.name: Golden Eyes
prompts.text: Use radiant golden eyes with intricate iris detail and a refined fantasy feel.

prompts.name: Heterochromia
prompts.text: Give the subject heterochromia, with each eye a different complementary color, while keeping the overall look balanced and natural.

prompts.name: Sleepy Eyes
prompts.text: Use half-lidded sleepy eyes that convey calmness, softness, and a relaxed mood.

prompts.name: Sparkling Eyes
prompts.text: Use large sparkling eyes full of light, emotion, and visual energy.

prompts.name: Sharp Eyes
prompts.text: Use focused sharp eyes that convey confidence, intelligence, and strong presence.
